Visual inspection confirms gemini-flash's reading of 826 pounds, 1 shilling, and 6 pence. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read these values as 16 shillings and 0 pence.

Visual inspection confirms 'College Officers' is an entry with an associated amount (100.0.0) on the same line, not a header. gpt-5-mini correctly extracted this; gemini-flash incorrectly identified it as a header with no amount.

Visual inspection confirms 'The Tuition Fund' is an entry with an associated amount (3394.7.11) on the same line. gpt-5-mini correctly extracted this as a single entry. gemini-flash incorrectly split it into a header and a blank-description entry.

Visual inspection confirms 'The Exhibition Fund.' is an entry with an associated amount (308.14.2) on the same line. The description is taken from gemini-flash ('Fund.' vs gpt-5-mini's 'Funds'), and the row type and amount from gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash incorrectly split this into a header and a blank-description entry.
Amounts (1.2.0) show consensus. Description 'Other expenses.' is taken from gemini-flash as it accurately includes the lowercase 'e' and period visible in the image. gpt-5-mini had 'Other Expenses'.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. This subtotal is visually distinct and right-aligned from the 'Other expenses' entry on the same line. Values are clearly visible.
